name: Logging & Diagnostics
description: Provides structured application logging (debug/info/warn/error) to rotating log files, crash and hang detection with dedicated log paths, and a log viewer dialog for in-app inspection.

Managers/AppLogger.cs.content:
enum LogLevel
    Debug, Info, Warning
class AppLogger
  Initialize() -> void
  Debug(string source, string message, Exception? ex = null) -> void
  Info(string source, string message, Exception? ex = null) -> void
  Warn(string source, string message, Exception? ex = null) -> void
  Error(string source, string message, Exception? ex = null) -> void
  Log(LogLevel level, string source, string message, Exception? ex = null) -> void
  Flush() -> void
  GetRecentEntries() -> string[]
  GetLogDir() -> string
  GetLogFilePath() -> string
  ReadLogFile() -> string
  ClearMemory() -> void

Managers/SafeFileWriter.cs.content:
class SafeFileWriter
  WriteInBackground(string filePath, string content, string callerName, Action<string>? onError = null) -> void
  FlushAll(int timeoutMs = 5000) -> bool

patterns: Background file write queue to avoid blocking UI thread
Crash/hang logs written by unhandled exception handlers in App.xaml.cs
